title: Review round 4: jmap-chat crate
notes: R4 calibration: P0 findings: 1 (subscribe_events panics on non-ASCII UTF-8 char boundary in scan_from offset — regression introduced by R2 scan_from optimization). P1 findings: 0. P2 findings: 1 (chrono and ulid are dead production dependencies). P3/P4 findings: 0 filed (SSE trim() vs RFC 8895 one-space rule is P4 at most and benign for JSON). Confidence: 85% chance of no further bugs. Running out of real complaints: YES. Recommendation: STOP.
